name: Element (Matrix)

pricing.details: Free on matrix.org homeserver. Element One subscription $5/month for managed homeserver. Self-hosting is free.

description: Client for the Matrix open federated messaging protocol. Supports end-to-end encryption via the Megolm protocol. Privacy properties depend heavily on server selection or self-hosting.
rationale: Matrix's decentralized, federated architecture eliminates single points of control over communications. Running a private homeserver provides complete data sovereignty. E2E encryption is available but not enabled by default in all room types. Cross-signing for device verification adds complexity. The usability of key management is below Signal. When self-hosted, Matrix provides strong privacy guarantees; on the default matrix.org server, user metadata is retained.
